playbook.intent: Drifted ICP and stale pricing → adjusted ICP one-liner + 1 queued price experiment.
playbook.scope: Solo founder runs a 2-hour quarterly review: paid-cohort signal reviewed, ICP one-liner adjusted, one price experiment queued or rejected, free-to-paid funnel decision recorded. Exit artifact is updated positioning doc + ADR for pricing decision.

success-criteria.criterion: ICP one-liner adjusted (or confirmed unchanged with evidence)
1 price experiment queued OR rejected with rationale
Free-to-paid funnel decision recorded in ADR

stage.name: Review
stage.intent: Look at who actually paid, not who we thought would.

tasks.task: Pull paid-cohort traits from Stripe + analytics

stage.decision-gate: Advance when traits are documented. Refuse to skip — drift accumulates silently.

stage.name: Adjust ICP
stage.intent: Sharper ICP one-liner OR confirm with evidence.

tasks.task: Rewrite ICP one-liner with current traits
Ship copy edit if delta is wide

stage.decision-gate: Advance when one-liner is honest about current customers. Stay if vague.

stage.name: Price

tasks.task: Score candidate experiments (raise / restructure / add tier)

stage.decision-gate: Required output: ADR with decision + reasoning. No 'maybe next quarter'.

extra.value: [Full ICP rewrite — adjustments only at this cadence, Pricing UI redesign — copy-only edits here]
[≥1 quarter of paid-cohort data (Stripe + analytics), Existing ICP one-liner]
[Raising prices reflexively because someone on Twitter said 'charge more' — needs cohort evidence, Holding ICP fixed because rewriting feels like 'admitting we were wrong']
['Does the ICP one-liner describe my actual top 10 paying customers?', 'Is the pricing ADR honest about risk, or does it only list upside?']

{human: faion get-content quarterly-persona-pricing-recal --format md, agent: faion get-content quarterly-persona-pricing-recal --format context, json: faion get-content quarterly-persona-pricing-recal --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
